name: Dr. Douglas Christianson
endorsementQuote: Rootlabs is one of the few formulations I recommend without reservation — the sourcing transparency and bioavailability testing put them in a category of their own.

name: Dr. Kristy Appelhans
endorsementQuote: In 17 years of pharmacovigilance work, the level of third-party testing Rootlabs runs on every batch is rare. That's the bar consumers should expect.
